sourceTitle: AI & Academic Integrity | Center for Teaching Innovation
evidenceSnippetOriginal: A set of course policy icons has been developed by the GenAI Advisory Council to help Cornell instructors communicate with students about appropriate AI use for different courses and assignments. They are downloadable and can be incorporated into your syllabus or assignment instructions, to help provide clear guidance to students about course expectations.
